payload.topic: Third-Party Vendor Risk Management & SaaS Integrations
payload.additional_instructions: Ensure that vendor due-diligence controls aren’t bypassed during onboarding. All third-party systems must undergo mandatory security assessment.

compliance_violation: User role and clearance information not provided in the payload; unable to verify authorization. Additionally, the event does not demonstrate compliance with ISO_27001 | 5.36 (regular review of policy compliance) nor with NIST_AI_RMF | GOVERN-1.1 (organization-wide AI risk governance) or OECD_AI | OECD-1.5 (accountability and auditability) as these controls are not addressed in the payload.
